steps.action: Inspect UA construction code at lines 318-323 of main.js
steps.expected: UA is derived dynamically from session.getUserAgent() with Electron identifiers stripped
steps.observed: Lines 318-323 show: const originalUA = youtubeSession.getUserAgent(); const chromeUserAgent = originalUA.replace(/Electron\/\S+/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

evidence.uaConstructionCode: main.js lines 318-323: UA built dynamically via youtubeSession.getUserAgent() with Electron identifiers stripped using regex .replace(/Electron\/\S+/g, ''), then applied via youtubeSession.setUserAgent(chromeUserAgent) and passed to loadURL({ userAgent: chromeUserAgent })

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CORS-001 confirmed OutOfBlinkCors and disable-features are fully removed from main.js. VAL-CORS-004 confirmed hardcoded Chrome/120 UA string is removed and replaced with dynamic UA construction from Electron's bundled Chromium version.
